meta.title: My programs — a tailored plan that knows when to ease off
meta.description: A structured program over 4 to 8 weeks, fitted to your frequency and level. Generated by AI, automatic deload included.

hero.title: A tailored plan that knows when to ease off.
hero.subtitle: 3 questions, a complete plan in 30 seconds. Your frequency, your goal, your level — the AI handles the rest, recovery deload included.

benefits.ai_body: Goal, frequency, level. That's it. The AI builds a structured plan, week by week, no second-guessing.
benefits.deload_body: Week 4 (or 8) eased off by default. Rest is planned alongside effort. Your body actually progresses.
benefits.personal_title: Fits you, not the other way around
benefits.personal_body: One to six sessions per week, your call. The program adapts — you don't have to bend to a rigid format.
benefits.fixed_title: Or start with a ready-made plan
benefits.fixed_body: 3 standard programs ready to launch if you want to skip onboarding: beginner, get-back-in-shape, cardio express.

final_cta.title: Launch your plan in 30 seconds.
final_cta.subtitle: Create a free account, answer 3 questions, your program is ready.
